_source: Derived from Knowledge Base/Content Calendar/Project1 (Homey Furnishing / blackout curtains / Jade) + Marketing/Copywriting. This is the canonical benchmark input+expected-output for the generative journeys.
service: Blackout curtains for Singapore HDB/BTO rooms
audience: Singapore HDB/BTO homeowners furnishing a bedroom

awareness.copy_requirement: Prove fit, value, and next step. Assume they know curtains/blackout exist and compare vendors; lead with proof + mechanism, not category education.
awareness.source: Content Calendar/Project1/Curtains Market Awareness.md; Marketing/Copywriting/Research/Choose the Segment and Awareness Level for a Page.md

hook.text: why your blackout curtains are not making your room dark

decode.pain: room still bright after buying blackout curtains
decode.tension: they may waste money on better fabric when the setup is wrong

script_variables.COMMON_METHODS: darker fabric, expensive fabric, S-fold pleats, ceiling track, blackout label
script_variables.CORE_TRUTH: blackout only works when the setup controls light leaks
script_variables.COMMON_MISTAKE: treating fabric as the whole solution
script_variables.BRAND_DIFFERENCE: HomeySG checks room, track, width, drop, side coverage, wall space, and light gaps before production
script_variables.CTA_BENEFIT: blackout curtains that make the bedroom darker

character.name: Jade
character.identity: mid-20s Southeast Asian woman, long medium-brown loose hair, dark brown almond eyes, warm light-medium skin, petite/average build
character.wardrobe: clean white fitted t-shirt with the Homey Furnishing logo on the left chest
character.voice: warm, clear, conversational Singaporean UGC voice, lightly energetic

image_prompt_quality_rules.prefer: quantified parameters (e.g. 90mm f/1.8) over adjectives; pro terminology / film stocks over 'cinematic vibe'
image_prompt_quality_rules.require: negative constraints (no text, product not distorted, do not obscure face)
